description: Create the complete Phantom Edge indicator at indicators/phantom-edge.pine - a unified Pine Script v6 indicator that merges 5-script trading logic into a single 3-layer system (WHERE/WHEN/HOW) with full visual map, dashboard, and alerts.
steps: Create indicators/ directory and indicators/phantom-edge.pine file starting with //@version=6 and indicator('Phantom Edge', overlay=true, max_boxes_count=500, max_labels_count=500, max_lines_count=500)

Define all User Defined Types (UDTs): ZoneInfo (for S/R zones with price, direction, strength, box reference), TradeState (for tracking active setups with entry, sl, tp1, tp2, tp3, status), PivotData (for HTF/LTF pivot tracking with high, low, trend direction)
Create Input Group 1 'HTF Bias': pivot lengths for 1W/1D/4H, toggle for each TF, lookback bars
Create Input Group 2 'LTF Alignment': which lower TFs to scan (2H/1H/30M/15M), pivot lengths for each
Create Input Group 3 'Zones & Levels': S/R zone settings (ATR multiplier for thickness, max zones count, zone merge distance), PDH/PDL/PWH/PWL toggles
Create Input Group 4 'Entry Logic': sweep detection sensitivity (wick percentage), CISD confirmation window (bars), displacement body multiplier, FVG detection toggle, retest entry option
Create Input Group 5 'Risk & Targets': TP1 RR ratio (default 1.5), TP2 RR ratio (default 3.0), TP3 option (opposing daily level), use dynamic targets toggle
Create Input Group 6 'Kill Zones': London session (02:00-05:00 NY), NY session (07:00-10:00 NY), timezone selector, filter toggle
Create Input Group 7 'Visuals': colors for bullish (green family), bearish (red family), neutral/PDH-PDL (yellow), PWH/PWL (blue), line widths, label sizes, toggles for each layer visibility
Create Input Group 8 'Dashboard': show/hide toggle, position (top-right default), size selector
Create Input Group 9 'Alerts': toggles for each alert type (bias change, LTF aligned, sweep detected, entry signal)

Implement Layer 1 (WHERE - HTF Bias): Use request.security() with barmerge.lookahead_off to fetch 1W/1D/4H data. For each TF, detect pivot highs/lows using ta.pivothigh()/ta.pivotlow(). Determine trend: Bullish if HH+HL pattern, Bearish if LH+LL, else Ranging. Require 2-of-3 TFs to agree for confirmed bias. Calculate Premium/Discount zones from daily range midpoint (midpoint of daily swing high and swing low).

Implement Layer 2 (WHEN - LTF Alignment): Use request.security() for 2H/1H/30M/15M. Apply same pivot-based structure detection on each LTF. Compare each LTF trend to HTF bias. Status is 'Ready' when majority of LTFs align with HTF bias direction, 'Wait' when they are counter-trending or ranging.

Implement Layer 3 (HOW - Entry Execution): Draw S/R zones as boxes using ATR-based thickness from detected swing pivots. Detect EQH (equal highs within tolerance) and EQL (equal lows within tolerance) as liquidity pools. Draw PDH/PDL (dashed yellow, extend=extend.both) and PWH/PWL (solid blue, extend=extend.both). Implement entry confirmation sequence: (1) Liquidity sweep detection - wick through level with close back inside, (2) CISD/Displacement confirmation - large body candle (body > displacement_mult * ATR) breaking structure or FVG created, (3) Entry signal with SL at sweep extreme, TP1 at 1.5R, TP2 at 3R, TP3 at opposing daily level. Implement FVG detection (gap between candle 1 high and candle 3 low for bullish, or candle 1 low and candle 3 high for bearish) and display as semi-transparent boxes.

Implement visual drawing: ALL lines must use extend=extend.both. Use xloc.bar_index for all drawing objects. S/R zones as boxes with color.new() semi-transparent fill. Manage object limits by deleting oldest objects when approaching 500 limit. Lines should be stable (use var arrays to track drawn objects, only redraw when levels change).

Implement Dashboard table: Create table at position.top_right. Row 1: HTF Bias showing 1W/1D/4H with Bull/Bear/Range and colored cells. Row 2: LTF Alignment showing 2H/1H/30M/15M status. Row 3: Overall verdict 'WHERE: Bullish/Bearish' and 'WHEN: Ready/Wait'. Row 4: Current setup state (Idle/Sweep Detected/Confirmed/Entry Active). Row 5: Active trade info (Entry/SL/TP1 values when in setup).

Implement Alert conditions: alertcondition() for 'HTF Bias Changed' (when 2/3 agreement flips), 'LTF Aligned' (Ready state triggered), 'Sweep Detected' (liquidity sweep at AOI), 'Entry Signal' (full confirmation). Include JSON-formatted alert messages with ticker, action, entry, sl, tp1, tp2, tp3 using {{ticker}} and {{close}} placeholders.
Add header comment block documenting the script purpose, the 3-layer system, author info, and version. Ensure all sections have clear // --- Section Name --- comments throughout.

Final validation: Ensure barstate.isconfirmed is used for entry signals, all request.security() calls use barmerge.lookahead_off, all var declarations for persistent state, all na handling with nz() or explicit na() checks, no division by zero potential.
acceptance_criteria: Contains indicator() with overlay=true, max_boxes_count=500, max_labels_count=500, max_lines_count=500
Contains all 9 input groups with properly typed inputs
Contains UDT definitions for zone and trade state management
Layer 1 uses request.security() for 1W/1D/4H with barmerge.lookahead_off and ta.pivothigh()/ta.pivotlow()
Layer 2 uses request.security() for 2H/1H/30M/15M with same anti-repaint approach
Layer 3 implements S/R zones, EQH/EQL detection, PDH/PDL/PWH/PWL levels, entry sequence, and FVG detection
Dashboard table is implemented with all 5 rows of information
All 4 alert conditions are defined with descriptive messages
Uses camelCase for variables, UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for constants per steering file conventions
Uses var for persistent state variables
Handles na values with nz() or explicit checks
Code is organized with // --- Section Name --- comments
Script is a single complete file with no external dependencies
verification: Run: grep -c 'indicator(' /projects/sandbox/ai-2/indicators/phantom-edge.pine to confirm indicator declaration exists
Run: grep -c 'request.security(' /projects/sandbox/ai-2/indicators/phantom-edge.pine to confirm MTF data fetching (should be >= 7 calls)
Run: grep -c 'extend.both' /projects/sandbox/ai-2/indicators/phantom-edge.pine to confirm all lines extend both directions (should be multiple occurrences)
Run: grep -c 'alertcondition(' /projects/sandbox/ai-2/indicators/phantom-edge.pine to confirm alerts (should be >= 4)
Run: grep -c 'barmerge.lookahead_off' /projects/sandbox/ai-2/indicators/phantom-edge.pine to confirm anti-repaint (should match security calls)
Run: grep -c 'barstate.isconfirmed' /projects/sandbox/ai-2/indicators/phantom-edge.pine to confirm non-repainting signals
Run: grep 'group' /projects/sandbox/ai-2/indicators/phantom-edge.pine | sort -u | wc -l to confirm input groups (should be >= 9)
findings: File created at 754 lines, expanded to 852 lines after review fixes. All 7 semantic review issues addressed: (1) pivot tracking uses two-variable shift pattern, (2) alertcondition uses static messages with alert() for dynamic data, (3) PDH/PDL uses lookahead_on with high[1]/low[1], (4) sweep logic decoupled from showPDHL toggle, (5) trade state fully resets on exit with line deletion, (6) EQH/EQL uses nested loops for last 5 entries, (7) zone eviction uses distance-based removal. Balanced brackets confirmed. No local Pine Script compiler available.
